title: apply_member_patch extraction from space_set
description: The member-patch logic was extracted from an inline loop body in space_set into apply_member_patch(). The async fn + Result<(), Value> return is the right shape: caller breaks on Err using '?' via if let Err(e). Role validation (reject strings outside admin/moderator/member) was also added in this refactor. Both are correct. A future contributor might fold it back inline for 'simplicity', but the inline version was 33 lines of nested if/let — the extracted version is easier to test and read. Note: nie-a8ds.5 identifies that the Ok(()) path for non-member paths is silent rather than returning an error, which should be fixed in apply_member_patch.
